prompt: Use the uploaded reference image only to preserve the person’s identity. Preserve the face, facial proportions, jawline, lips, eyes, eyebrows, hairstyle, natural hair color, skin tone, body proportions and overall appearance with 100% accuracy. Do not alter any facial features. Ultra-photorealistic iPhone 17 Pro selfie in the middle of Times Square, New York, shot from a low-angle, wide 24mm front camera. The woman is holding the phone at arm’s length, looking directly into the camera with a relaxed confident expression, making a peace sign with her right hand. Wind naturally blows her hair. She is wearing a bright red Adidas Firebird track jacket with three white stripes over a plain white T-shirt. Directly behind her, an enormous New York subway train is suspended high above the street, completely trapped in gigantic white spider webs stretched between the surrounding skyscrapers. The webs are ultra-realistic, thin, translucent, and shimmer in the daylight. Crowds of tourists below are looking up, taking photos with their phones. Famous Times Square LED billboards surround the scene, yellow taxis, Manhattan skyscrapers, dramatic perspective emphasizing the massive train overhead.

promptZh: 仅使用上传的参考图像来保留人物身份。以 100% 的准确度保留面部、面部比例、下颌线、嘴唇、眼睛、眉毛、发型、自然发色、肤色、身体比例和整体外观。请勿更改任何面部特征。超写实 iPhone 17 Pro 自拍，位于 纽约时代广场 中心，采用低角度、24mm 广角前置摄像头拍摄。女子手臂伸直拿着手机，直视镜头，表情放松自信，右手比出剪刀手。微风自然吹动她的头发。她穿着一件 亮红色 Adidas Firebird 运动夹克，内搭纯白 T 恤，夹克上有三条白色条纹。在她身后，一列巨大的纽约地铁列车悬浮在街道上方，完全被困在摩天大楼之间延伸的 巨大的白色蜘蛛网 中。蛛网极其逼真、纤细、半透明，在日光下闪烁。下方的游客人群正抬头仰望，用手机拍照。著名的时代广场 LED 广告牌环绕四周，黄色出租车、曼哈顿摩天大楼，戏剧性的视角突显了头顶上方巨大的列车。
